name: codex-windows-control-recovery
description: Diagnose and safely recover Codex Desktop Computer Use and browser-control plumbing on Windows after app updates.

interface.shortDescription: Recover Windows control without uninstalling Codex
interface.longDescription: A fail-closed diagnostic and recovery runbook for Codex Desktop Computer Use, in-app browser control, writable runtimes, named pipes, and post-update verification on Windows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-windows-control-recovery to diagnose and safely restore Codex Desktop Computer Use on Windows without uninstalling, resetting, or changing language settings.
